title: GST/HST rebate – Commercial goods and artistic works exported by a non-resident - Canada.ca
content:
## GST/HST rebate – Commercial goods and artistic works exported by a non-resident
Form GST189 – Reason code 4
Reason code 4 provides a rebate of the GST/HST paid on commercial goods and artistic works exported by a non-resident (subsections 252(1) and 252(2) of the Excise Tax Act ).

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
